summary: Expand a short highlighted idea into a full email or paragraph using three independent settings.

length.controls: how much text is produced (structure only)

values.short: 1 short paragraph or 2–3 sentences; core message, no padding
values.medium: 2–3 paragraphs; greeting, body, and closing for email
values.long: 4+ paragraphs; full detail, context, and elaboration

values.formal: professional language, no contractions, no slang, structured sentences
values.friendly: warm, approachable, contractions okay, personable phrasing
values.casual: relaxed, conversational, contractions and informal phrasing okay

values.simple: short common words, short sentences, minimal jargon
values.standard: everyday professional vocabulary, moderate sentence length
values.advanced: sophisticated vocabulary, longer/more complex sentence structures

independence: Length, Tone, and Complexity are three separate prompt instructions, applied together but never merged. Changing one while holding the other two fixed must only change that dimension.

profile.format: comma-separated key-value pairs auto-injected into the prompt
profile.permanentNote: standing instruction always included in every generation
profile.whenEmpty: generic phrasing, no placeholder text, no errors

persistence: All settings saved in the popup auto-apply to every future generation without re-entry.
